description: Leadbay is a Y Combinator-backed AI lead discovery tool for SMB-focused sales teams that surfaces hard-to-find prospects and predicts revenue growth.
tagline: Predictive, configurable B2B lead discovery for field sales
overview: Leadbay is an AI-powered lead discovery and qualification tool built for small and medium-sized businesses doing field sales. It trains a model on a company's own CRM, ERP, and CSV data alongside market signals to surface qualified leads that other tools tend to miss and to forecast revenue potential.
what_is: Leadbay is a lead discovery and qualification platform designed for small and medium-sized businesses. It helps sales teams uncover prospects that are difficult to surface through conventional tools, making it easier to expand pipelines with genuinely new opportunities. Backed by Y Combinator, the product is built around finding unique SMB leads, though it is not yet available in all markets and prospective users in unsupported regions can join a waiting list.

Sales and marketing teams looking to broaden their lead lists with hard-to-find contacts benefit most from Leadbay. New leads become available shortly after onboarding, and the platform's qualification layer helps teams prioritize the most promising prospects rather than sorting through raw lists manually. It sits within the go-to-market stack as a lead enrichment and discovery layer.

Leadbay pairs well with CRMs and email marketing tools by feeding them fresh, qualified lead data. Its current focus on SMBs and selective country availability means it is not yet a fit for large enterprises or teams that require global coverage, so verifying regional support before adopting is worthwhile.
